---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# arguments

## methods with diff types

```{julia}
# NOTE: Abstract types could be used directly
function f1(x::AbstractFloat)
    return x + 1
end
f1(1.)
```

```{julia}
# Union types
function f2(x::Union{Int, Nothing})
    if x === nothing
        return 0
    else
        return x + 1
    end
end
f2(nothing)
```

```{julia}
# collect types
function f3(x::Vector{<:AbstractFloat})
    return x[1] + 1
end
f3([1., 2.])
```

```{julia}
# parametric approach
function f7(x::T) where {T <: Int64}
    return x + 1
end
f7(1)
```


## special usage

```{julia}
# default parameters
function f4(x::Int64; y = 1::Int64)
    return x
end

# omit default parameters
# NOTE: the kwargs could not be used in the body of the function.
function f5(x::Int64; kwargs...)
    return f4(x; kwargs...)
end
```

```{julia}
# 可变数量的位置参数：args...
function f6(xs::Int64...)
    return sum(xs)
end
# splatting：把 tuple/vector 展开成参数
a = (1, 2)
f6(a...)
```
